form.formComment: Jumps from box 1 for the first time after placing latest at this track (30.71) in a Grade 6. Can feature with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Jumps from box 1 for the first time after placing latest at this track (30.71) in a Grade 6. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Latest effort finished 5th on April 4 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Mighty Shazam beaten 7 lengths (26.03) in a Grade 6. The form from last run stacks up well. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won over this track and trip. Latest effort finished 5th on April 4 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Mighty Shazam beaten 7 lengths (26.03) in a Grade 6. The form from last run stacks up well. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked at the first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (25.81) at Q Lakeside. Drawn close to the inside. Must be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (25.81) at Q Lakeside. Drawn close to the inside. Must be included.

form.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Latest effort finished 5th on April 9 over 520m at this track behind Soul Escaping beaten 11 lengths (30.91) in a Grade 6. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won over this track and trip. Latest effort finished 5th on April 9 over 520m at this track behind Soul Escaping beaten 11 lengths (30.91) in a Grade 6. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and became unbalanced rounding the turn into the home straight.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (30.39) over 520m at this track. Awkward draw to overcome. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fourth over 484m at Casino. Not far from winner last time but has the job ahead here.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by one length at Capalaba over 366m (19.94) beating Hello Gemini in Maiden on March 29. Hard to go past again.
